From the Very Beginning

Look How Far
God Has Brought You

These photos are proof — you were chosen, special, and beautiful from day one

🌸

The same little girl God chose before the foundation of the world 💕

👑

She was born to celebrate — and the world was made to celebrate her 🎂

A Word for Your Season

Amira — This Season
Is Not Your Enemy.
It Is Your Teacher.

My dear Amira,

Can I tell you something that might just completely change the way you see where you are right now? This season is not happening to you. It is happening for you. There is a difference — and once you see it, you cannot unsee it.

The place you are standing in right now? This is not a waiting room. This is not a punishment. This is not a sign that something went wrong. This is a classroom. And God Himself is your teacher. The most brilliant, most strategic, most intentional teacher in all of existence sat down, looked at your life, and said — "This one is going to need a very specific kind of training. Because what I am about to release her into is bigger than what most people will ever carry."

And then He designed your curriculum personally. Not a generic programme. Not a one-size-fits-all lesson plan. A bespoke, tailor-made, hand-crafted training season — designed specifically for Amira. 😊 You should be flattered, honestly.

So here is the invitation — and this is the part nobody tells you: enjoy this season. Yes. Enjoy it. Not because it is painless. Not because everything makes sense. But because you are in the room where the greatest preparation of your life is happening. You are being dressed. You are being equipped. You are being fitted for a royalty that most people never get to wear — because most people never go through the training required to carry it.

Think of it this way — a queen does not wake up one morning and simply walk into her coronation. She is prepared. She is trained. She is shaped by seasons that taught her who she is, what she carries, and how to wear the weight of a crown. Every hard morning you have had is a fitting. Every difficult season is a tailor at work. And the garment being prepared for you is more glorious than you have the ability to imagine right now.

In the Spirit of Apostle Joshua Selman
There are things God cannot teach you in comfort. Comfort produces convenience — but it takes pressure to produce diamonds. The very things that are pressing on you right now are not crushing you. They are cutting you. Shaping you. Bringing out a brilliance in you that was always there but needed the right conditions to emerge. Do not run from the process. The process is the gift.

Amira, take this season like a student who knows the exam is coming and decides to master every subject. Take notes. Pay attention. Ask God — "What are you teaching me in this? What am I meant to learn here? What am I building in this season that I will need in the next one?" Because everything happening right now has a purpose. Every lesson has a test. And every test passed is a promotion.

The season that looks like it is slowing you down is actually the very thing that is advancing you into a world much greater than what you can currently see. You are not behind. You are being accelerated in a direction the naked eye cannot yet detect. But heaven can see it. And heaven is cheering.

So take a breath. Lift your head. And enjoy the school. Because the graduation that is coming will make everything that happened in the classroom make perfect and beautiful sense. 🌸

Cheering for you always, your friend who stands with you 💕

You Are in Good Company

Every Giant Had
a Valley First

God did not change His method. The people He uses the most are the ones He trains the hardest. Look at the evidence.

⚱️
Joseph
From the pit to the palace

Joseph had a dream from God when he was seventeen. A dream of greatness, of leadership, of influence. And what happened immediately after? His own brothers threw him into a pit. Then he was sold into slavery. Then falsely accused. Then forgotten in prison for years.

If you had met Joseph in that prison cell and asked him how he was doing — do you think it felt like God's plan? Do you think it felt like the dream was coming true? Everything in the natural said the opposite.

But Potiphar's house taught him administration. The prison taught him how to serve under authority. The interpretation of dreams kept his gift sharp. Every place he was — God was using the difficulty to prepare him for the weight of the assignment.

And then — in one single day — Joseph went from the prison to becoming Prime Minister of Egypt. Not because the suffering was random. But because God had been building a Prime Minister the whole time.

Amira, the challenges you are facing are not destroying your future — they are constructing the leader that your future will need. 🔑
🦁
David
Anointed in the field, crowned after the fight

Samuel anointed David as king while he was still a shepherd boy — before anyone else saw what God saw. And what came after that anointing? A lion. A bear. A giant named Goliath. Years of running from Saul. Living in caves. Being misunderstood even by his own family.

The anointing came first. The throne came later. And between the anointing and the throne was everything that would make David the kind of king Israel had never had.

Think about this: David could not have written the Psalms without the caves. The most comforting words ever written — "The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want" — were written by a man who had experienced real want. Real danger. Real abandonment. His pain became the world's comfort for thousands of years.

God was not punishing David in those cave years. God was writing through him.

Your pain, Amira, is producing a depth in you that will one day be the answer for people who have no one else to turn to. 👑
🕊️
Mary
Highly favoured — and immediately tested

The angel came to Mary and said the most beautiful words anyone could hear: "You are highly favoured. The Lord is with you." And then — almost immediately — everything got complicated. How do you explain to your fiancé that you are pregnant by the Holy Spirit? How do you explain it to your family? How do you say yes to an assignment you do not fully understand?

Mary asked the most human question: "How will this be, since I have not known a man?" And the angel's answer was not a five-year plan. It was simply: "The Holy Spirit will come upon you." In other words: you do not need to know HOW. You just need to say yes. The Holy Spirit handles the how.

And because the Greatest Who Ever Lived was growing inside her — the attacks, the confusion, the questions from others — they were not random. When you carry something great, the resistance will always match the greatness of what you carry.

Amira, you do not need to figure out how. The Holy Spirit who overshadowed Mary is the same Spirit working in your situation right now. Just say yes. 🌸

The Pattern Is Always the Same:

Promise → Preparation → Promotion. God never promotes without preparing. And preparation always feels like difficulty from the inside. Joseph did not know he was being prepared. David did not know he was being prepared. Mary did not fully know what was growing inside her. But God knew. And God knows about you too, Amira.

This Is Not a Surprise Attack

Nobody Goes to War
Without Preparation

God is a God of strategy. He never sends His children into battle without first making them ready for it.

"For which of you, intending to build a tower, does not sit down first and count the cost, whether he has enough to finish it?"

Luke 14:28 — Jesus on preparation and strategy

Jesus Himself said that no general goes to war without first sitting down and calculating — how many soldiers does my enemy have? What does this war require? What will it cost? No serious commander sends troops into battle unprepared and uncalculated.

And God — the Commander of angel armies, the Lord of hosts — is the most strategic Being in existence. He does not panic. He does not improvise. He sees the end from the beginning, and He works backwards from the victory to make sure you arrive there equipped.

So ask yourself this: if there are bigger challenges coming — and there are always bigger challenges coming for those God is raising up — would you want to face them as you are right now? Or would you want to face them as the person this season is building you to become?

Think of it this way: God is not your gym trainer who gives you heavy weights to punish you. He is the trainer who looks at the competition ahead and says "She is going to need stronger arms than that. Add more weight." 😄 The discomfort is the point. The discomfort IS the training.

This season is building in you things that cannot be built in comfort. Resilience. Patience. Faith that does not require evidence. Trust that does not require understanding. These are not soft virtues — they are weapons. And the battles you are being prepared for will require every single one of them.

In the spirit of Apostle Joshua Selman
Difficulty is not a sign of God's absence. It is often the evidence of His trust. God does not give heavy assignments to fragile people. He gives heavy assignments to the ones He has been building, quietly and carefully, for a long time. If your season feels heavy, ask yourself — what weight of glory is God preparing you to carry?

The bigger the calling, the longer the training. Joseph trained for thirteen years. David trained in the wilderness for years. Jesus Himself spent thirty years in preparation for three years of ministry that changed all of history. God is never in a hurry. But He is always on time.

🔥 Difficulty Is Trust

God only stretches what He plans to use. The weight of your season is the measure of His confidence in you. Lighter people get lighter loads. He gave you this because He knows you.

🛡️ Pain Is a Professor

Every painful experience is teaching you something you could not learn in a classroom. The lessons are expensive — but they are permanent. Nobody can take them from you.

⚓ The Wait Is Not Wasted

Nothing God does is wasted. Every single day of this season is building something in you that will be needed — by you, and by the people you are being sent to help.

👑 Bigger Battles Need Bigger Soldiers

There are challenges ahead of you that will require the exact version of you that this season is producing. God can already see them. He is getting you ready.

Your Favourite Scripture — Fully Unpacked

Philippians 4:6–9
God Did Not Give You This By Accident

Philippians 4:6–9 (NKJV)

"Be anxious for nothing, but in everything by prayer and supplication, with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God; and the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus. Finally, brethren, whatever things are true, noble, just, pure, lovely… meditate on these things… and the God of peace will be with you."

🚫

Anxious for NOTHING

Not some things. Not the small things. Nothing. That thing keeping you up at night? God says — not that one either. Hand it over completely.

🙏

In EVERYTHING — Pray

The job situation. The finances. The direction. The loneliness. Bring it ALL. Nothing is too small or too big or too complicated for Him to handle.

💛

With THANKSGIVING

Come grateful before the answer arrives. This is faith in action — thanking Him for what you cannot yet see because you trust who He is.

🧠

Guard Your MIND

What you think about shapes what you believe is possible. Fill your mind with truth, with beauty, with the promises of God — and watch your perspective shift.

"The God of Peace will be WITH you"

This is not just a promise that peace will come. It is a promise that the God of Peace Himself will be present with you. Not the feeling of peace — the Person who is Peace. Emmanuel. God with us. He is not watching from a distance. He is right there in your situation, in your room, in your heart — and His very presence produces a calm that logic cannot explain and circumstances cannot steal.

Amira — the God of Peace is not coming. He is already with you. Right now. In this season. In this moment. As you read this. ✨

God did not give you Philippians 4:6 because your life was going to be easy. He gave it to you because He knew there would be seasons that would try to drown you in anxiety — and He wanted you to have the exact weapon you would need. This verse is your sword. Every time fear knocks, you answer with Philippians 4:6. Every time the enemy says "What are you going to do now?" — you say: "Nothing. I am going to pray, with thanksgiving, and let the God of Peace handle it."

That is not weakness. That is the most powerful strategy in the universe. 🌸

A Challenge from a True Friend

What Is God Asking
While You Wait?

The waiting season is not empty time. God is asking questions — and He is watching what you do with the silence.

"What are you doing now, while you wait for what you are believing for?"

The time between the promise and the fulfilment is never meant to be passive. It is the time for the things that cannot happen when you are busy. The reading. The building. The prayer. The preparation. What are you building in this season that you could not build if you were already in the fullness of what God has for you?

"What is the plan that breaks the regular, predictable schedule of your life?"

Ordinary schedules produce ordinary outcomes. What is the dream, the idea, the thing that has been sitting in the back of your mind that could break the pattern? The skincare business. The content. The community. The gifts God put in your hands — what would happen if you picked them up right now, in this season, and started?

"Where is the excellence of Christ visible in what you are doing right now?"

Excellence is not about having all the resources. It is about honouring God with what you currently have access to. In this season — is there something you could do with excellence, with intention, with quality, that shows the world who lives inside of you? Because Colossians 3:23 says: "Whatever you do, do it heartily, as to the Lord." Even in the waiting. Especially in the waiting.

This Season Is a First Class Ticket 🎓

Most people look at a difficult season and see a setback. But what if you looked at it and saw a first-class education? What if every hard day was a lecture? Every unanswered question a research assignment? Every closed door a redirection to a better corridor?

Amira — enjoy this season. Not because it does not hurt. But because it is producing in you something that ease and comfort never could. The depth you are gaining right now is the very depth that will make your voice carry weight when you speak. That will make your testimony shake rooms. That will make your story the answer someone else has been searching for.

God is dressing you right now. Not in ordinary clothes. In the greatest royalty apparel — fitted perfectly for the assignment ahead of you. And you are going to walk into that next season so prepared, so grounded, so unshakeable — that the world will not know what hit it. 👑

The Parable of the Talents — Matthew 25

The master gave each servant talents and went away. He did not tell them when he was coming back. He did not give them a schedule. He simply entrusted the talents and left. And the servants who were commended were not the ones who waited until they had more information — they were the ones who immediately went and put their gifts to work.

The one who was condemned was not the one who failed. He was the one who buried his talent and did nothing with it while the master was away. He let fear — "I was afraid" — make the decision for him.

Amira, this waiting season is your "while the master was away" moment. What will He find when He returns? A talent buried in the ground out of fear? Or a life that used every single gift, every quiet day, every hard season to build something that will make heaven applaud?

The wait is not a pause. The wait is an invitation to begin. 🌱

From a Friend Who Stands With You

This Is Your Season
To Shine — Not to Shrink

Amira, let this be said plainly —

There is a version of this season that you could spend in your head — overthinking, worrying, wondering, replaying every question mark in your life like a song stuck on repeat. And then there is another version. The version where you decide that this season is going to count. Where you show up every day and say — "Okay Lord, I am in the school. Teach me everything."

That second version? That is the one that produces legends. That is the one that Joseph chose in the prison. That is the one David chose in the cave. That is the one Mary chose when the angel's announcement turned her whole world upside down. They did not waste their difficult seasons in self-pity. They used every single day as preparation material.

And honestly? The fact that you are reading this right now — the fact that you are still standing, still seeking, still believing — already tells me you are not the kind of person who stays down. The enemy knows it too, which is exactly why he works so hard to distract you. 😄 Do not give him the satisfaction.

This season is birthing something beautiful. Not despite the difficulty — through it. The same way gold does not become gold by sitting safely on a shelf. It becomes gold through fire. And what is coming out on the other side of your fire is going to be so pure, so refined, so undeniably glorious — that the very people who did not understand your season will not be able to explain your victory.

So here is what a praying friend is asking of you today — not out of pity, but out of genuine faith in who God made you to be:

Dress yourself in the truth of this season. Wake up and say — "I am being trained. I am being prepared. I am being fitted for something greater." Make that your first thought before your feet touch the floor. Make it your declaration before the day tries to tell you something different.

And while you are in the school — do not isolate yourself. The enemy's greatest strategy in a difficult season is to convince you that nobody understands. That it is safer to disappear. That your pain is too unique for community. But Proverbs 11:14 says it plainly: "In the multitude of counselors there is safety." You were not designed to carry this alone — and you do not have to.

What Pastor Christine Bature would say to you
A woman who knows who she is does not shrink in hard seasons — she grows. She does not hide her light because the night feels long — she burns brighter. You are not a victim of this season, Amira. You are a student in it. And students who pay attention graduate with honours.

The prayers going up for you are real. The faith being held for you is real. And the future being prepared for you — that is the most real thing of all. God has not forgotten a single detail. He has not lost track of a single prayer. He has not abandoned a single promise He made over your life.

Your better season is not just coming. It is being built — brick by brick, lesson by lesson, day by day — right now, while you read this. 🌸

A friend standing with you in prayer, without ceasing 🙏💕

A Word of Wise Counsel

Isolation Kills
Faster Than the Season

There is a difference between Holy Ghost isolation — the kind where God pulls you aside like He did with Jesus in the wilderness, to fast and pray and prepare you — and self-imposed isolation born from the belief that nobody understands you, that your pain is too unique for anyone to reach, that it is easier to disappear than to risk being misunderstood.

If God is calling you into a season of solitude for His purposes — honour it. That is holy. That is preparation. But if you are isolating because pain has convinced you that the world cannot handle your story, that sharing your struggle is weakness, that keeping everything inside is safer — Amira, that is the enemy using your pain against you.

"Where there is no counsel, the people fall; but in the multitude of counselors there is safety." — Proverbs 11:14

God did not design you to carry your weight alone. He placed specific people in your path — not to fix everything, but to help you bear it. Wise counsel is not gossip. It is not vulnerability with everyone. It is the selected, trusted, Spirit-led few who can speak truth into your season without judgment, without abandoning you, and with the wisdom of God.

And while friendship can be one part of that — there are also voices that carry the kind of anointed wisdom that can reach the parts of you that even the people closest to you cannot access. With your permission, here are some of the voices I believe are speaking exactly what you need for this season:

Apostle Joshua Selman

For understanding spiritual authority, the mystery of seasons, and how God trains those He loves. His teaching on "The School of the Holy Spirit" will shift something in you.

Pastor Dolapo

For the intersection of faith and excellence — understanding how to honour God in the practical, day-to-day details of life while trusting Him with the bigger picture.

Pastor Christine Bature

For healing, identity, and the strength of a woman who knows who she is in God. Her voice carries a grace specifically for women navigating difficult seasons.

Mummy Awonshika

For the power of intercession and prophetic declaration. She will teach you how to pray in a way that changes atmospheres and accelerates what God is doing.

Apostle Femi Lazarus

For fire, breakthrough, and the understanding that your setback is a setup. His sermons have a way of making faith feel possible again when everything has tried to kill it.

Dr. Myles Munroe

For understanding your purpose and potential. He will show you that nothing about your life has been accidental — and that the gifts inside you are not for you alone. They are for the world.

A Special Message

A Special Video
For Amira 🎬

For Amira — with prayer and friendship 🌸

"The Lord your God is with you, the Mighty Warrior who saves. He will rejoice over you with singing." — Zephaniah 3:17

Who Is AMIRA?

Every Letter of Your Name
Is a Declaration

God did not name you by accident. He named you by assignment.

A
Anointed

Set apart before the world knew your name. The oil of God is on your head, your hands, your future.

😄 You were chosen before you chose your outfit this morning. That is how early God got to you.

M
Mighty

Your gentleness is not weakness. It is power wrapped in grace. Lions go quiet before they roar.

🦁 Yes, you are the lion. Some people are just confused about who is walking among them!

I
Irreplaceable

There is no backup version of you. God broke the mould. The world has been waiting specifically for you.

😂 God said "one is enough" after He made you. THAT is how one-of-a-kind you are.

R
Royalty

You are the daughter of the King of kings. That crown was placed on your head before you were born.

👑 Adjust your crown. Not because it is falling — because queens fix their crowns. That is what they do.

A
Abundant

Lack was never your portion. Overflow is your default setting — even when it does not look like it yet.

🎉 God's plan for you is so big, it is still loading. Just wait — the buffering ends soon!

Everything Inside You Is Valid

The World Has Been
Waiting for You

Your gifts. Your story. Your voice. Your grace. Stop hiding them. The world is not better without them — it is incomplete.

🔥

Your Gift Is Not an Accident

That thing you do effortlessly — the way you see people, the way you understand beauty, the way you can make someone feel cared for just by being present — that is not personality. That is an anointing. God placed it there before you were born and it has been waiting for you to stop being embarrassed by it and start walking in it.

🌍

The World Has Been Waiting for You — Specifically

Not a version of you that is more confident. Not a future you with more resources. You. Right now. The world has been running a deficit of what you carry — your perspective, your grace, your understanding of people, your gift to help women feel seen and beautiful and worthy. Nobody else can fill that gap. Only Amira can fill what Amira was sent to fill.

📣

Stop Hiding — The World Cannot Afford It

Every day you keep your gift hidden is a day someone who needed it went without. Every time you talk yourself out of sharing what God placed in you, somebody somewhere is searching for exactly that thing and cannot find it. Your hiding is not humility — it is a debt you are accumulating against the people you were sent to serve. It is time to show up.

💎

Your Story Is Somebody Else's Survival Manual

Everything you went through — every season that hurt, every door that closed, every moment you thought you were falling behind — it is all curriculum. God does not waste a single experience. Your pain was not random. It was preparation. And the wisdom you carry from having walked through it is exactly what someone else is desperately searching for. Your story will save lives.

👑

The Honour Is Already Written

The world will not just accept what God put in you — it will honour it greatly. Honour follows those who dare to show up fully. It does not follow people who play small. When you step into the fullness of what God made you to be — without apology, without shrinking, without waiting for permission — the honour that follows will surprise even you.

🌱

You Were Made to Raise Many

This is not just about you building a business or finding a path. This is about the people who will come after you. The women who will look at your life and say "if she could do it, so can I." The younger ones who need to see someone who looks like them walking in fullness and purpose and confidence. You are not just building for yourself. You are building a door for others to walk through.

✨

Everything Inside You Is Valid

Every idea. Every dream. Every instinct about beauty, about helping people, about what women need to feel whole and seen and cared for. All of it is valid. All of it is real. All of it has been placed there by a God who does not make mistakes. You do not need another person's validation to know that what you carry is real. God already signed off on it before you were born.

🦋

The Cocoon Is Not the Destination

The caterpillar never stays in the cocoon. The cocoon is not the plan — it is the process. What looks like restriction from the outside is actually the pressure that forms wings. This season is not keeping you from your destiny. It is forming you for it. And when you come out of this — and you will come out of this — you will fly in ways you cannot yet imagine.

Amira, hear this clearly —

The thing that makes you uncomfortable about yourself — that thing you keep quieting down, that gift you keep shrinking so others are not intimidated, that vision you keep telling yourself is too big — that is the exact thing God wants you to give the world.

Dr. Myles Munroe said it plainly: "The wealthiest place on earth is the graveyard — because there lie businesses that were never started, books that were never written, songs that were never sung, and inventions that never saw the light of day."

Do not take your gift to the grave, Amira. The world needs to learn from what God has given you. And nothing — no season, no setback, no delay — can stop what God has ordained. Nothing can stop you, unless you decide to stop yourself.

Declare This Out Loud, Amira:

I am valid and I am ready
My gifts are needed in this world
I will no longer hide what God gave me
The world will learn from my story
I am anointed, appointed and sent
I carry what no one else can carry
I am not behind — I am right on time
The God of Peace is with me — right now

This is just the beginning, Amira. 🌹👑
